content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Find Median in a Stream". Refer to LeetCode description: https://leetcode.com/problems/find-median-from-data-stream/
content.inputFormat: The input will be a stream of integers, and after each integer, the median of the current stream will be queried.
content.outputFormat: The output will be the median of the current stream after each integer is added.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Using two heaps, a max heap to store the smaller half of the numbers and a min heap to store the larger half of the numbers.
solution.timeComplexity: O(log N) for adding a number and O(1) for finding the median
solution.spaceComplexity: O(N) for storing the numbers in the heaps
